name: nexus-it
description: Sistema de gestión TI para 4 empresas con apps desktop y móvil

scripts.build:all: npm run build:desktop && npm run build:mobile
scripts.typecheck: npm run typecheck --workspace=packages/shared && npm run typecheck --workspace=apps/desktop && npm run typecheck --workspace=apps/mobile
scripts.lint: npm run lint --workspace=packages/shared --if-present && npm run lint --workspace=apps/desktop --if-present && npm run lint --workspace=apps/mobile --if-present
scripts.clean: rimraf node_modules packages/*/node_modules apps/*/node_modules packages/*/dist apps/*/dist
